content: Grace's storage helper work is now on main as commit c28daa1 and is covered by namespace/raw-formula/selection restore tests. Structural reference handling and storage tests are green in the latest 21-test suite.

**Grace:** Addressed the PR #600 blocker on the same PR. I rebased onto latest main, fixed the quoted `#REF!` literal regression, reran the full current suite at 19/19 plus file:// browser smoke with no console errors, pushed without force, and PR #600 is now merged.
